name: Impute Advanced
description: Advanced Imputation Node - Handle missing or specified values in numeric columns using statistical strategies such as mean, median, mode, or a user-defined constant. Ideal for data cleaning, feature preparation, and building robust analytical pipelines.

fields.name: inputCols
fields.title: Columns
fields.description: Select one or more numeric columns where missing or target values should be imputed. These columns will be processed independently using the chosen strategy.

fields.name: strategy
fields.title: Impute Strategy
fields.description:
Choose how missing values are filled:
• mean - replace with the average of the column
• median -  replace with the middle value (robust to outliers)
• mode -  replace with the most frequent value
• constant -  replace with a fixed user-defined value

fields.name: replaceValue
fields.title: Replace Value
fields.description: Optional: specify a particular value to be treated as missing and replaced (e.g., 0 or -1). If left empty, only null or missing values are imputed.

fields.name: constants
fields.title: Constant
fields.description: Constant value used to replace missing or target values. This field is only applicable when Impute Strategy is set to constant.
